query: SELECT l.id, l.subcategoriaId, s.nome as subcategoria, c.nome as categoria, l.totalAnual FROM orcamento_planejado_linhas l JOIN orcamento_subcategorias s ON s.id = l.subcategoriaId JOIN orcamento_categorias c ON c.id = s.categoriaId WHERE l.versaoId = (SELECT id FROM orcamento_versoes WHERE empresaId = 660004) ORDER BY c.nome, s.nome;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X2C2Km2DVLwNTk.c1886cf7bd86 --database GdPAuRogRcNPzV7ENB2n8s --execute SELECT l.id, l.subcategoriaId, s.nome as subcategoria, c.nome as categoria, l.totalAnual FROM orcamento_planejado_linhas l JOIN orcamento_subcategorias s ON s.id = l.subcategoriaId JOIN orcamento_categorias c ON c.id = s.categoriaId WHERE l.versaoId = (SELECT id FROM orcamento_versoes WHERE empresaId = 660004) ORDER BY c.nome, s.nome;
